zh.Beetham, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德貝坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Betham於1207年出生在英國波藍德時，他的父親Thomas De Betham57歲，母親Amice De Betham Fitzrichard17歲。他於大約1270年與Mrs. Emma De Betham結婚。他去世於1292年享年85歲，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德貝坦。

zh-hans.Beetham, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德貝坦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Betham于1207年出生在英国波藍德时，他的父亲Thomas De Betham57岁，母亲Amice De Betham Fitzrichard17岁。他于大约1270年与Mrs. Emma De Betham结婚。他去世于1292年享年85岁，埋葬在英国維斯特莫藍德貝坦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Betham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Beetham
meanings: English: habitational name from Beetham in Westmorland, probably named from a plural form, bjóthum, of the Old Norse element bjóth ‘embankment, table’, i.e. ‘(place near) the embankments’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Betham was born in 1207, in Cumberland, England, his father, Thomas De Betham, was 57 and his mother, Amice De Betham Fitzrichard, was 17. He married Mrs. Emma De Betham about 1270. He died in 1292, at the age of 85, and was buried in Beetham, Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Betham est né en 1207, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas De Betham, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Amice De Betham Fitzrichard, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Emma De Betham environ 1270. Il est décédé en 1292, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Beetham, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Betham 1207 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas De Betham 57 und seine Mutter Amice De Betham Fitzrichard 17. Er hat um 1270 Mrs. Emma De Betham geheiratet. Er starb 1292 im Alter von 85 Jahren und wurde in Beetham, Westmorland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Betham è nato il nel 1207 nel Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Thomas De Betham, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Amice De Betham Fitzrichard, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Emma De Betham circa 1270. Morì nel 1292, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Beetham, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Bethamが1207年にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Thomas De Bethamは57歳，母Amice De Betham Fitzrichardは17歳であった。約1270年にMrs. Emma De Bethamと結婚した。彼は1292年に85歳で死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドビーサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Betham(이)가 1207년 영국 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas De Betham(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Amice De Betham Fitzrichard(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 Mrs. Emma De Betham(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1292년 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 브이섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Betham nasceu em 1207, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas De Betham, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Amice De Betham Fitzrichard, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Emma De Betham aproximadamente 1270. Ele faleceu em 1292, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Beetham, Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Betham родился в 1207 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas De Betham было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Amice De Betham Fitzrichard, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Emma De Betham около 1270 г. Он умер в 1292 г. в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности битам, вестморланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Betham nació en 1207, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas De Betham, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Amice De Betham Fitzrichard, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Mrs. Emma De Betham aproximadamente 1270. Murió en 1292, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Beetham, Westmorland, Inglaterra.
